prompt: Please generate a vintage Qipao-style mother-daughter photo shoot based on the two real female photos uploaded by the user. Character settings: The young woman is the daughter, 28 years old; the older woman is the mother, 56 years old. Please strictly preserve the real identity characteristics of each person, including face shape, facial proportions, eyes, nose, lips, skin tone, sense of age, hairstyle base, and overall temperament. The mother should retain a natural sense of maturity and slight traces of time; nasolabial folds should be shallow, not too heavy, but not completely smoothed out. The daughter should maintain her young, natural, and delicate characteristics. Overall style: Vintage Oriental Qipao photo shoot, quiet, gentle, and dignified, with the atmosphere of a commemorative mother-daughter portrait. The image features soft studio lighting, with a slight film feel and a faint oil painting quality. The background is a grey-green, blue-grey, or slate-grey vintage studio backdrop, potentially including slight flower branches, canvas texture, or Chinese wooden elements. Clothing and hairstyle: The mother wears a light grey-green, lake blue, or grey-blue traditional Qipao; the daughter wears a dark blue, navy, or black-blue improved Qipao. Both outfits belong to the same visual system. Hairstyles should be handled naturally based on original hair length, overall appearing dignified and neat with a Chinese-style updos or gathered feel; long hair can be a low bun or chignon, while short hair maintains its base with a side part, tucked behind the ears, or a vintage short hairstyle. Quality requirements: Realistic photographic texture, low saturation, high-end, and soft; no excessive skin smoothing, no 'fake' faces. Composition 1: Single photo in 3:4 vertical orientation, double half-body composition, characters close together, balanced and relaxed. Content 1: Mother and daughter standing side-by-side, daughter on one side of the mother, body leaning slightly toward her, naturally holding the mother's arm or leaning on her shoulder. Both look at the camera with gentle, quiet, and dignified expressions, carrying a restrained natural smile. Atmosphere 1: This image focuses on the formal, authentic, and dignified visual of a mother-daughter commemorative portrait. Composition 2: Single photo in 3:4 vertical orientation, close-up or near half-body composition, highlighting the relationship between faces, shoulders, and hands. Content 2: Daughter approaches gently from behind or the side-rear of the mother, one hand resting naturally on the mother's shoulder. There should be a natural interactive response: they could be smiling at each other, or the daughter looking tenderly at the mother while the mother turns her head slightly in response. Overall intimate, soft, and companionable. Atmosphere 2: Focuses on the authentic, gentle, and responsive sense of the mother-daughter relationship. Composition 3: Single photo in 3:4 vertical orientation, medium or 3/4 body composition, clearly showing the relationship between sitting and standing postures and displaying part of the Qipao silhouettes. Content 3: Mother sitting on a Chinese wooden chair, daughter standing behind or to the side-rear, one hand resting gently on the mother's shoulder or the chair back. Both look at the camera, with quiet, calm, and dignified expressions. A small side table, blue and white porcelain vase, and white flower branches can be added on one side as accents. Atmosphere 3: Focuses on the layers of the mother-daughter relationship and the vintage sense of ritual. Composition 4: Single photo in 3:4 vertical orientation, full-body or near full-body composition, natural and relaxed proportions, fully displaying the overall styling. Content 4: Mother and daughter standing side-by-side, daughter naturally close to the mother, possibly holding her arm. Mother can naturally hold a round silk fan or have hands naturally folded. Both look at the camera together, with gentle, dignified, and peaceful expressions. Background can include Chinese wooden frames, a side table, blue and white porcelain, or light-colored flower branches to enhance completeness. Atmosphere 4: The complete mother-daughter commemorative portrait of the set, focusing on overall styling, complete composition, and a gentle, dignified mother-daughter temperament.
